title: Family
description: Family lineage groups — del Valle family, Newhall family, Acosta family

title: Cultural Group
description: Cultural and ethnic communities — Tataviam, Californio, Chinese railroad workers, Japanese American farmers, Basque settlers. CARE Principles apply for Indigenous groups.

title: Informal Association
description: Groups without formal legal structure — posses, clubs, crews, social associations

title: Expedition Party
description: Historical exploration and expedition groups — Portolá Expedition, De Anza Expedition, Bennett-Arcan Party

title: Military Unit (Informal)
description: Informal militia or volunteer companies — California Battalion, irregular units
